findings.message: mod.ts has 8 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
mod.ts lacks section comment headers — recommended for navigability
exported function 'generateOpenAPISpec' uses non-standard prefix 'generate' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
type 'OpenAPIConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
exported function 'bridgeInvalidation' uses non-standard prefix 'bridge' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'resetCacheProvider' uses non-standard prefix 'reset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'safe' uses non-standard prefix 'safe' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
type 'FactoryConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'QueryParams' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
exported function 'otelMiddleware' uses non-standard prefix 'otel' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
README missing 11/12 mandated sections (Overview, Quickstart, Mental model, API, Recipes, Configuration, Testing, Observability, Architecture, Stability, Compatibility, License)
no tests/ directory and no inline *_test.ts files — every package needs meaningful tests
package owns runtime/adapters but does not import @netscript/logger
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
